themes.title: Forgeline — Industrial & Trade Supplier HTML Template
themes.oneliner: A premium website template that actually understands the trade — datasheets, photometry downloads, quote requests and next-day delivery messaging, not another generic "business theme".

themes.title: Callout — Electrician Website Template (local trades)
themes.oneliner: A complete website for a local electrician — built around what actually wins trade work: reviews, fixed-quote promises, photos of real jobs, and a phone number everywhere.

themes.title: Sideline — Grassroots Junior Football Club Template
themes.oneliner: The first club website template built for how junior clubs actually work — 20+ teams, boys' and girls' pathways, volunteers and safeguarding, no "first team" your club doesn't have.

themes.title: Terrace — Football Club HTML Template (claret & sky)
themes.oneliner: A complete football club website in claret & sky (plus a 5-way colour switcher) — fixtures, results, league table, squad profiles, match reports and academy trials, styled for your colours out of the box.
